<html lang="es">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>Acelga</title>

<style>
body{
    margin:0;
    background:white;
}

img{
    width:100%;
    display:block;
}
</style>

</head>

<body>

<img src="acelga.png" alt="Infografía de la acelga"/>

</body>

</html>
